meaning: adj.伟岸的,魁梧的,身材高大健壮的n.皮带材料,橡皮膏
examples: He was a bricklayer – a big, strapping fellow.
He was a big strapping guy but short on brains.
The messenger bent and scratched at his knee where the strapping chafed.
The Spaniard, who had heavy strapping on both knees, needed treatment for tendonitis during the match.
Rivers, frantically strapping tourniquets onto the remains of his legs to try to stanch the bleeding.
